name: Atsuko Hakari - YOUtopia
description:
There's a place I wanna take you, but I'm not quite there, myself yet~

A world's been buried, where love is the law, a YOUtopia~

(Song: Bring me the Horizon - YOUtopia)

You and Atsuko travel to the rural countryside of Japan, to spend a sabbatical year there.
